localizedMetadata.description: This course helps learners build strong collaboration skills for today’s digital workplace. It covers effective virtual communications..
localizedMetadata.name: Digital Collaboration Essentials for Modern Teams
localizedMetadata.overview: This course helps learners build strong collaboration skills for today’s digital workplace. It covers effective virtual communication, teamwork across remote and hybrid environments, and the use of digital tools to improve productivity. Learners will gain practical strategies to collaborate confidently, reduce communication gaps, and work efficiently with cross-functional teams.
localizedMetadata.richTextOverview: This course helps learners build strong collaboration skills for today’s digital workplace. It covers effective virtual communication, teamwork across remote and hybrid environments, and the use of digital tools to improve productivity. Learners will gain practical strategies to collaborate confidently, reduce communication gaps, and work efficiently with cross-functional teams.

localizedMetadata.name: Animating Emotions: Using Movement to Convey a Feeling!
localizedMetadata.overview:
After completing this course, you will be able to::
Explain data flow and architecture in Experience Platform
Navigate through the Experience Platform UI
 Verify customer data ingestion in Experience Platform
 Verify application of data governance policies on the ingested data
 Retrieve data by using Query Services
 Create and activate audiences from Real-Time Customer Profile data
 Leverage Application Services to create real-time customer experiences
 Explain dataflow from Experience Platform to Intelligent Services
 Explain data flow and architecture in Experience Platform
 Navigate through the Experience Platform UI
 Verify customer data ingestion in Experience Platform
localizedMetadata.richTextOverview:
After completing this course, you will be able to::

  1. Explain data flow and architecture in Experience Platform
  • Navigate through the Experience Platform UI
  • Verify customer data ingestion in Experience Platform
  • Verify application of data governance policies on the ingested data
  • Retrieve data by using Query Services
  • Create and activate audiences from Real-Time Customer Profile data
  • Leverage Application Services to create real-time customer experiences
  • Explain dataflow from Experience Platform to Intelligent Services
  • Explain data flow and architecture in Experience Platform
  • Navigate through the Experience Platform UI
  • Verify customer data ingestion in Experience Platform
